title: tragopogon lamottei
intro: Tragopogon lamottei, also known as Lamb's-tongue or French sowthistle, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragopogon lamottei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues and other health conditions.
